info.shortName: Global X Adaptive U.S. Factor E
info.longName: Global X Adaptive U.S. Factor ETF

funds_data.description: The fund invests at least 80% of its total assets in the securities of the index. Its 80% investment policy is non-fundamental and requires 60 days prior written notice to shareholders before it can be changed. The index is designed to dynamically allocate across three sub-indices that provide exposure to U.S. equities that exhibit characteristics of one of three primary factors: value, momentum and low volatility.
